_comment: Species: Giant Python (巨蟒) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Giant Python

canonical.appearance: Serpentine body 20 m long, scales earth-brown, jaw can dislocate to swallow cultivators whole
canonical.size: 20 m adult, 8000 jin; ancient 100 m, 100000 jin
canonical.behavior: Ambush predator; coils in spirit-herb groves; swallows prey to cultivate in stillness
canonical.habitat: Spirit herb hills, dense forests, river basins of Zhao/Chu
canonical.diet: spirit herbs, weaker beasts, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Common prey of thunder beasts; rival of giant centipedes
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: giant_python — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
